name: drillable
description: Drillable's developer tools — ground your coding agent in real, cited sources instead of guesses.

plugins.name: use-drillable
plugins.description: Makes your coding agent ground a reference claim — the MCP spec, agent practices, networking, units, and more — in a cited source instead of guessing.

plugins.name: drillable-context
plugins.description: Grounds your coding agent in YOUR project's facts (your docs/decisions/conventions) — drills them instead of guessing, abstains instead of bluffing. A local MCP over a folder of markdown.
